dlp_detection.title: DLP: {count} {pattern} detections on {domain}
dlp_detection.sql: SELECT dlp_host as domain, json_extract(dlp_findings, '$[0].pattern') as pattern, COUNT(*) as count, dlp_mode as mode FROM "cagent_logs" WHERE log_type = 'dlp_violation' AND _timestamp > {last_check_us} GROUP BY dlp_host, pattern, dlp_mode ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 50
